subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Lord of Names and the Sovereign Who doeth as He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک اسما و سلطان یفعل ما یشاء را لایق و سزاست که ظلم معتدین و اعراض
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
